title: Office of Citizenship | USCIS
content:
## Office of Citizenship
The Office of Citizenship (OoC) within the Office of Citizenship, Partnership, and Engagement, is mandated by the Homeland Security Act of 2002 (Pub. L. No. 107–296). The mission of OoC is to provide federal leadership, tools, and resources to proactively foster civic assimilation and create awareness of its importance to American society. OoC advances assimilation by promoting the importance of learning English, reinforcing commitment to constitutional values, strengthening the integrity of the naturalization process, and deepening understanding of the rights and responsibilities that define American citizenship.
To learn more about the tools and resources that the Office of Citizenship provides, visit the Citizenship Resource Center .
